---
title: "Its Celine"
image: images/fayrouz.jpg
toc: false
about: 
    template: jolla
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 17em
    links: 
      - text: LinkedIn
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/
      - text: GitHub
        href: https://github.com/CelineeUWC/CelineeUWC.github.io/settings/pages
      - text: Email
        href: almiar1@stolaf.edu
---

Hello Everyone, my name is Celine and I am very excited to share my project on this website
